'''âth-th-v''' ('''kathathav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:namedrop|namedrop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:namedrop|namedrop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-th-v
|-
! Lemma
| kathathav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithathav|thithathav]] || [[word:jithathav|jithathav]] || [[word:shithathav|shithathav]] || [[word:kithathav|kithathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthathav|thuthuthathav]] || [[word:jujuthathav|jujuthathav]] || [[word:shushuthathav|shushuthathav]] || [[word:kukuthathav|kukuthathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthathav|thuthathav]] || [[word:juthathav|juthathav]] || [[word:shuthathav|shuthathav]] || [[word:kuthathav|kuthathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthathav|thuthathav]] || [[word:juthathav|juthathav]] || [[word:shuthathav|shuthathav]] || [[word:kuthathav|kuthathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethathav|thethathav]] || [[word:jethathav|jethathav]] || [[word:shethathav|shethathav]] || [[word:kethathav|kethathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothathav|thothothathav]] || [[word:jojothathav|jojothathav]] || [[word:shoshothathav|shoshothathav]] || [[word:kokothathav|kokothathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothathav|thothathav]] || [[word:jothathav|jothathav]] || [[word:shothathav|shothathav]] || [[word:kothathav|kothathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothathav|thothathav]] || [[word:jothathav|jothathav]] || [[word:shothathav|shothathav]] || [[word:kothathav|kothathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthathav|thĂŠthathav]] || [[word:jĂŠthathav|jĂŠthathav]] || [[word:shĂŠthathav|shĂŠthathav]] || [[word:kĂŠthathav|kĂŠthathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathathav|thathathathav]] || [[word:jajathathav|jajathathav]] || [[word:shashathathav|shashathathav]] || [[word:kakathathav|kakathathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathathav|thathathav]] || [[word:jathathav|jathathav]] || [[word:shathathav|shathathav]] || [[word:kathathav|kathathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathathav|thathathav]] || [[word:jathathav|jathathav]] || [[word:shathathav|shathathav]] || [[word:kathathav|kathathav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathathav|shathathav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathathav|goshathathav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathathav|gokishathathav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathathavnĂŒ|shathathavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathathavnknĂŒ|goshathathavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathathavnĂŒ|gokishathathavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathathavshĂ«|shathathavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathathavnkshĂ«|goshathathavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathathavshĂ«|gokishathathavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathathavro|shathathavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathathavnkro|goshathathavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathathavro|gokishathathavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathavmu|shathathavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathathavnkmu|goshathathavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathavmu|gokishathathavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathathavsher|shathathavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathathavnksher|goshathathavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathathavsher|gokishathathavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathathavng|shathathavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathathavnkng|goshathathavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathathavng|gokishathathavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathathavya|shathathavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathathavnkya|goshathathavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathathavya|gokishathathavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathathavyam|shathathavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathathavnkyam|goshathathavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathathavyam|gokishathathavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathathavnĂŒshĂ«|shathathavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathathavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathathavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathathavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathathavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathathavnĂŒro|shathathavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathathavnknĂŒro|goshathathavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathathavnĂŒro|gokishathathavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathavnĂŒmu|shathathavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathathavnknĂŒmu|goshathathavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathavnĂŒmu|gokishathathavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathathavshĂ«nĂŒ|shathathavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathathavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathathavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathathavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathathavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathathavshĂ«ro|shathathavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathathavnkshĂ«ro|goshathathavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathathavshĂ«ro|gokishathathavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathavshĂ«mu|shathathavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathathavnkshĂ«mu|goshathathavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathavshĂ«mu|gokishathathavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathathavronĂŒ|shathathavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathathavnkronĂŒ|goshathathavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathathavronĂŒ|gokishathathavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathathavroshĂ«|shathathavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathathavnkroshĂ«|goshathathavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathathavroshĂ«|gokishathathavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathavromu|shathathavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathathavnkromu|goshathathavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathavromu|gokishathathavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathathavmunĂŒ|shathathavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathathavnkmunĂŒ|goshathathavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathathavmunĂŒ|gokishathathavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathathavmushĂ«|shathathavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathathavnkmushĂ«|goshathathavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathathavmushĂ«|gokishathathavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathathavmuro|shathathavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathathavnkmuro|goshathathavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathathavmuro|gokishathathavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
